hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '\.github/workflows'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not edit workflow files without explicit permission"}}'; fi; }
